content.fact_text: Implemented the Express routing module for the Order Management system, integrating security, validation, and observability.

provenance_data.behaviour: Binds Express middleware and controllers for the Order API. Implements correlation ID tracking, RBAC via injected middleware, Zod-based request validation, and circuit breaker protection for order retrieval. Routes are configured for full CRUD order lifecycle operations.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the unified routing layer for Order management, ensuring all requests pass through security, validation, and monitoring gates.
